resources.string: Swipe left or right — or tap an icon in the bottom bar — to move between the four main screens. More is tap-only.
Galactic Signature — today\'s kin, its tone and seal.
Destiny Oracle — the five-seal oracle plus the hidden PSI (Akashic) seal.
Wavespell — the 13-day wavespell of the current kin.
More — 13-Moon calendar, Moon phase, Holon and the codex.

The ‹ Today › stepper at the bottom moves one day back or forward. Today stays dim while you are on today and turns gold once you move away — tap it to jump back. For a far-off date, tap the calendar icon in the top bar and pick any day.
Tap any glyph or tone to see its name, meaning and color family. Seals keep their traditional colors — red, white, blue and yellow — and the tones their galactic gold.
Open the gear in the top bar to switch language, choose how the PSI (Akashic) seal is shown, and read what is new in this version.
Pick a date to add its kin
No kins yet. Add some to combine them.
If you want to contribute please write an email to otherrealitybelieved@gmail.com
